title: New Republic Astrogation Studies Center
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''New Republic Astrogation Studies Center''', or '''Astrographic Studies Center''', was the government-sponsored research organization dedicated to the gathering of information on [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] that were located outside the boundaries of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

The Center's primary focus for research was planets that held pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] governments, neutral or otherwise aligned planets on which the New Republic's central databases, which included those of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]], lacked sufficient detail.

[[Treta Zollarcos]] was a member of the staff.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''
